title: Define a custom workflow
story: As a framework user, I want to define my own workflow in a YAML file so that I can match my team's development process without modifying the framework.
acceptance_criteria: YAML file in .isdlc/workflows/ is discovered at session start
Workflow is available for execution with defined phases and settings
Invalid YAML produces a clear error message with file path

title: Extend a shipped workflow
story: As a framework user, I want to extend a shipped workflow by adding, removing, or reordering phases so that I can customize without duplicating the full definition.
acceptance_criteria: Diff operations (add, remove, reorder) resolve correctly against the base workflow
Custom phases with agent files can be added via add_phases
Phase ordering warnings are emitted but don't block execution

title: Natural language workflow matching
story: As a framework user, I want to describe what I want to do in natural language and have the framework match it to my custom workflow so that I don't need to remember command names.
acceptance_criteria: LLM matches user input to workflow intent descriptions
LLM confirms the match before executing
Ambiguous matches present candidates for user to choose

title: Use feature-light as a shipped variant
story: As a framework user, I want a lightweight feature workflow available out of the box so that simple features skip architecture and design phases.
acceptance_criteria: feature-light ships as a workflow extending feature
Existing --light behavior is preserved via the new workflow

title: Custom workflow survives updates
story: As a framework user, I want my custom workflow files preserved when the framework updates so that I don't lose my workflow definitions.
acceptance_criteria: User YAML files preserved during update
User files left in place during uninstall

title: Learn to create custom workflows
story: As a framework user, I want documentation explaining each shipped phase and how to write custom agents so that I can create effective custom workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Each shipped phase documented with purpose, inputs, outputs
Agent authoring guidance points to Claude Code docs and example agents
